metadata.longDescription: A darkly satirical thriller following an ambitious true-crime podcaster who leaves New York for the deserts of West Texas. Investigating the mysterious passing of an old acquaintance, he gets tangled in an eccentric web of local conspiracy, dark humor, and unfiltered regional culture.
metadata.title: Retribution Dust

metadata.longDescription: An idealistic young creative living on the outer fringes of the entertainment industry falls into an unpredictable arrangement with an enigmatic mentor, initiating a bittersweet crash course in infatuation, independence, and systemic industry politics.
metadata.title: Neon Illusions

metadata.longDescription: Constructed entirely from raw historical broadcast recordings and immersive archival tapes, this cinematic biography pieces together a striking, unvarnished portrait of a legendary global icon's turbulent public life and lasting cultural impact.
metadata.title: The Sovereign Icon

metadata.longDescription: A young boy navigates the universal trials of childhood, family bonds, and local community life against the vibrant musical backdrop and shifting social tides of a turning historical era.
metadata.title: Echoes of Cobblestone

metadata.longDescription: At an elite experimental aviation academy, daring fighter pilots push their mental and physical limits. When a reckless but unmatched aviator arrives at the facility, his disruptive confidence brings him into direct rivalry with the squadron's disciplined leader while he tries to win the respect of a brilliant civilian strategist.
metadata.title: Sky Wardens

metadata.longDescription: An investigative filmmaker journeys across vulnerable wilderness reserves to document the profound impact of rapid habitat loss and illegal trading networks on endangered global wildlife populations.
metadata.title: Vanishing Wilds

metadata.longDescription: Charting a meteoric rise from obscure roots to global superstardom, an explosive musical prodigy navigates a complex, co-dependent relationship with an enigmatic promoter spanning two turbulent decades. Crucial to his unstable journey is the few genuine personal relationships trying to keep him grounded.
metadata.title: The Golden Rhythm

metadata.longDescription: In the middle of the vibrant, retro 1970s, an ambitious suburban kid dreams of becoming the world's greatest criminal mastermind. To impress an elite league of established villains, he plots an over-the-top heist with the chaotic help of his eccentric, brightly colored little assistants.
metadata.title: Little Mischiefs: Dawn of Evil

metadata.longDescription: A modern fashion student finds herself inexplicably slipping across time into a vivid, flashing dreamscape of 1960s nightlife. As she follows a rising lounge singer's glamorous career, the retro fantasy begins to crack, unraveling into a dark and dangerous psychological haunting.
metadata.title: Midnight in the Neon

metadata.longDescription: An aristocratic family journeys to the sun-drenched coast of Southern Europe to unravel a long-hidden family secret regarding a luxurious villa left behind by their aging matriarch.
metadata.title: High Society: Next Chapter

metadata.longDescription: After witnessing a brutal betrayal that shatters his royal lineage during his youth, a displaced northern warrior returns decades later to claim justice. Armed with raw fury and guided by local seers, he embarks on an unforgiving quest to reclaim his family's honor.
metadata.title: The Frost Avenger

metadata.longDescription: After a lifetime of pulling off legendary heist operations, a notorious crew of animal outlaws is finally cornered by the law. To avoid major prison time, they agree to orchestrate their ultimate trick yet: convincing the world they have completely reformed into model citizens under the guidance of an eccentric local mentor.
metadata.title: The Misunderstood Crew

metadata.longDescription: A protective couple goes on the run to shield their young daughter from a secretive federal agency intent on harvesting her unprecedented, highly destructive kinetic abilities. As her powers become unstable with age, a lethal operative closes in on their position, forcing a fiery confrontation.
metadata.title: Ignition Point

metadata.longDescription: Flanked by a cohort of mystical allies across alternative dimensions, an expert sorcerer navigates the dangerous, fracturing pathways of the cosmic multiverse to confront an unpredictable reality-bending adversary.
metadata.title: Chronicles of the Broken Realm

metadata.longDescription: In a moody mid-century metropolis, a smooth-talking drifter learns the tricks of psychological illusion from a traveling carnival act. Weaponizing these manipulation tactics against the city's wealthy elite, he plots an ambitious swindle targeting a ruthless corporate tycoon, only to find himself outmatched by a calculated mentalist.
metadata.title: Alley of Illusions

metadata.longDescription: An elite rogue agent must execute a desperate, fast-paced global mission to stop a coalition of historical tyrants and underground syndicates from inciting a catastrophic world war.
metadata.title: The Sovereign Order

metadata.longDescription: Arriving at a secluded woodland rental cabin for a weekend retreat, a young couple discovers another pair has already checked in due to a booking error. They agree to share the space for the evening, but an abrupt overnight disappearance triggers an unsettling mystery.
metadata.title: Shadows in the Woods

metadata.longDescription: Desperate to secure funding for urgent family medical expenses, an ex-soldier partners with his erratic brother to execute a high-stakes metropolitan bank heist. When their escape plan shatters, they hijack an emergency medical vehicle carrying a wounded first responder, sparking an intense highway pursuit.
metadata.title: Sirens on the Run

metadata.longDescription: When a premier contract assassin turns down a high-profile assignment for a ruthless underground syndicate, he instantly becomes their top target. As federal authorities close in on the trail of bodies, the operative struggles to stay ahead while dealing with an aggressive, deteriorating memory condition that leaves him doubting his own choices.
metadata.title: Fading Tracks

metadata.longDescription: To protect her family from a dangerous criminal network, a long-haul truck driver reluctantly agrees to transport hidden, highly illegal cargo across state lines. Trailed closely by a relentless federal investigator, she must navigate a high-risk highway route to ensure their collective survival.
metadata.title: Midnight Cargo
